letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice nimbuspay-202601

To the Billing Department, NimbusPay:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice nimbuspay-202601, covering the
billing period 2026-01-01 through 2026-01-31.

Per the governing clause (Amendment 1 §2):

    "Effective June 1, 2025, the per-employee fee set forth in MSA Section 5.1 is amended to $8.50 per active employee per month."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $8,800.00.
The invoice as billed totals $9,352.50, a discrepancy of $552.50.

Calculation:
  - employee usage: expected 8500.00, billed 9052.50 (overcharge of 552.50)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $552.50 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Effective June 1, 2025, the per-employee fee set forth in MSA Section 5.1 is amended to $8.50 per active employee per month.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 552.50.
